brand_identity.name: AdInsight
brand_identity.description: A high-precision competitive intelligence tool for D2C marketing managers. The design language is 'Swiss Utility'—clean, objective, and information-dense, avoiding decorative fluff to focus on the ad creative and data.
brand_identity.theme_strategy: The Performance Pro (High Contrast Light Mode)

headings.usage: Used for page titles, section headers, and metric values. Brings a geometric, modern tech feel without being 'start-up cute'.

body.usage: Used for all data labels, ad copy, and general text. Optimized for reading at small sizes.

monospace.usage: Used for Ad IDs, dates, and raw data views.

primary.name: Obsidian
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key navigation elements.

AdCard.description: The core unit of the application. Displays the ad creative and its metadata.
AdCard.structure: Vertical stack. Image/Video on top (aspect-ratio preserved), Metadata below.

elements.header: Flex row. Brand Avatar + Name + Platform Icon (FB/IG).
elements.media: Full width. Max height 400px. Object-cover or contain based on format.
elements.footer: Grid of metrics: Active Days, Start Date, Format.
elements.actions: Hover overlay with 'View Details' or 'Analyze' button.

StatsWidget.visual_style: Flat white card with 1px border. No shadow.
StatsWidget.typography: Label is text-muted-foreground (sm). Value is text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight.

Charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines where possible. Tooltip must be high-contrast (Black bg, White text).

AdExplorer.filters: Sticky sidebar. Accordion style for Brand, Format, Theme, Status.

AIInsights.layout: Single column readable stream (Medium-blog style) + Sidebar summary.

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle lift (-2px) and shadow increase for clickable cards.
micro_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the exact shape of the content.

empty_states.style: Minimalist line art or geometric shapes. No cartoony illustrations.
empty_states.text: Clear instruction on how to generate data (e.g., 'Sync Now to see ads').

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Charts must be accessible (use patterns or distinct colors, not just shades of one color).
Dates should be formatted as 'MMM dd, yyyy' (e.g., Oct 24, 2025).
Currency/Numbers: Use compact notation for large numbers (1.2k, 1M).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'date-fns' if not present (already in package.json).
Ensure all API calls to Meta Ad Library are simulated or scraped as per user choice (Option 1: Scrape/Public Search). Do NOT implement official Meta API authentication.
Use 'localStorage' or a simple backend database to persist 'Saved Ads' if no DB is connected yet.
For the 'Sync Now' feature, show a visual progress indicator (e.g., 'Scanning 5/10 brands...').
Strictly follow the 'Forbidden' rules: No Teal (#1B93A4), No Space Grotesk font.
